market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
articles.description: Nearly 1,000 developers competed at the venue, from ecosystems like Base, Solana, and others arriving from companies like Microsoft and Google, most racing to build products around the theme of AI agents.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/8: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
articles.description: Bitcoin continues to find buyers on each dip, but charts suggest traders may struggle to overcome the $84,000-$92,000 resistance cluster.

articles.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
articles.description: The crypto wallet company pairs the XO Cash token with software tools that let AI agents transact using preset spending controls and stablecoin payments.

articles.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
articles.description: CloudFlare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.

articles.title: SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets, AI-driven finance
articles.description: The SEC chair linked the rise of AI-powered financial systems with growing demand for blockchain-based market infrastructure and automated settlement.

articles.title: US Senator questions Mark Zuckerberg on Meta’s stablecoin plans
articles.description: Elizabeth Warren asked the Meta CEO to provide details on a stablecoin integration to the platform, a week after a small rollout to creators in Colombia and the Philippines.

articles.title: Bitcoin profit-taking may 'accelerate' as price hits 3-month high: Analyst
articles.description: Despite the short-term price recovery, Bitcoin remains in a bear market, according to CryptoQuant analyst Julio Moreno.

articles.title: Mother Ventures is looking at moms as the ‘economic engine’
articles.description: The VC firm, which focuses on mothers as consumers, raised a $10 million debut fund.

articles.title: Poland says hackers breached water treatment plants, and the US is facing the same threat
articles.description: A report by Poland’s top intelligence agency accused Russia of sabotage and hacking activities against the country’s military and civilian infrastructure.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Wall Street wants more than just Bitcoin
articles.description: Institutional capital is returning to crypto as Bitcoin ETFs surge, prediction markets mature and banks accelerate tokenized finance adoption.

articles.title: Kraken parent goes for the OCC charter in bid to become a federal crypto bank
articles.description: Payward’s application would add a federally regulated trust company to the Kraken group’s existing Wyoming bank charter and Fed master account.

articles.title: Strategy's MSTR stock signals 80% rally potential despite Q1 loss
articles.description: MSTR is forming an ascending triangle pattern on its weekly price chart, pointing to a breakout move toward $350 in the coming months.

articles.title: US defense contractor who sold hacking tools to Russian broker ordered to pay $10M to former employers
articles.description: Former cybersecurity executive Peter Williams stole several surveillance and hacking tools and sold them for $1.3 million to a Russian broker that works with Putin’s government.

articles.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $80K control as US jobs data delivers surprise
articles.description: Bitcoin traders called a "healthy bullish backtest" as BTC price action kept them guessing over whether $80,000 could be reclaimed.

articles.title: On-Chain, In Court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
articles.description: US authorities find an additional $10 million connected to Sam Bankman-Fried, the former CEO of Celsius ditches his legal team and a new law in Washington state bans crypto ATMs.

articles.title: ECB's Lagarde’s digital euro warning: Why Europe shouldn’t just copy the U.S. stablecoin model
articles.description: Lagarde warned that large stablecoins like Tether and USDC, which now dominate a $310 billion market, pose financial stability risks and could transmit stress to underlying asset markets during periods of turmoil.

articles.title: 紐約市議員推動禁用黏鼠板法案，既不人道又有傳染風險，市長：老鼠問題應從環境衛生做起
articles.description: 近期老鼠氾濫與漢他病毒案例的出現，在台灣掀起一場「安鼠之亂」的討論熱潮，從如何防範老鼠入侵家中，到網友自行製作 […]

articles.title: 揭開行星形成關鍵一步：氣體如何轉變為旋轉盤
articles.description: 每一顆行星，包括太陽系中的所有行星，都是在環繞年輕恆星旋轉的氣體與塵埃盤中誕生。當緻密的分子雲核心在自身重力作 […]

articles.title: Pentagon releases UFO files on new website
articles.description: The initial set of files housed on the site will include those containing unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP) videos, photos, and original source documents from across the entire U.S. government. The materials have been reviewed for security purposes, but many have "not yet been analyzed for reso

articles.title: Bitcoin’s ‘overbought’ signal flashes price top warning with focus on $78K
articles.description: Bitcoin’s 36% rally from $60,000 resulted in the relative strength index flashing a potential top signal not seen since early 2026.
